item.title: Real-time C++ DSP engineer for VST3 plugin
item.description: Need a freelancer for real-time audio DSP in C++ / JUCE. VST and AUv3 targets.

item.title: Logo design for bakery
item.description: Simple logo, no music or sound design work.

item.title: iOS AUv3 synth engine (Rust or C++)
item.description: Contract: build on-device audio engine with real-time constraints.
